programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Bow feels overwhelmed after the birth of DeVante and learns she is suffering from postpartum depression; the kids babyproof the house in an effort to help their parents.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Bobby Valentino makes his musical debut in the mid-'90s as part of the R&B teen group Mista.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Hip-hop artist Lloyd becomes heartthrob with hits such as "Southside," "Get It Shawty" and "You," but his ties to the Murder Inc. record label nearly puts an end to his career.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Jessica is a stay-at-home mom who prides herself on homeschooling her two young sons; her family spends a lot of time in the living room, which is outdated, and in need of a drastic change; Jake and Jazz step in to fulfill her wishes.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Maura came to Los Angeles to pursue her dream of working in the film and television industry; chasing that dream has left her with very little time to focus on her first apartment; Jake and Jazz step in to give her the living space she deserves.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Brandi is a mom of three boys; her two-bedroom home has become a little chaotic, so Jake and Jazz create the perfect space for her kids to share, play and get their homework done.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Diana is a busy manager at a local party store, she is always either working late hours or on the go with friends and family; she has a quaint one-bedroom apartment that needs just the right touches to make it a space to entertain family and friends.

programme.title: Steppin' Back to Love
programme.desc: A once-loving Chicago couple uses stepping to find each other again after their marriage is threatened by money and infidelity woes.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: The Best Man for the Job
programme.desc: Delroy decides to run for city council with Imunique as his advisor; Delroy underestimates his competition.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Kelly's news of pregnancy; Delroy goes through a mid-life crisis and starts dressing younger; the gang puts on an intervention.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Latrell watches the Twilight Zone and falls asleep; Delroy gets greedy; Adonis sends back his plate of food.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. is destroyed by a blow to his ego when he can't get a date with Thelma's classmate.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The FBI shows up at the Evanses' asking a lot of questions about Florida's cousin Cleatus.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's friend discusses problems he has encountered with his teenage daughter.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: The family sets out to give Theo a lesson on life's realities.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo's math test is postponed when his pregnant teacher goes into labor.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise's decision about what college she will attend becomes complicated when Cliff and his father give their advice.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: A jealous Max secretly sabotages Regine's latest relationship.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: While attempting to save a Harlem jazz club from demolition, Kyle fantasizes that the gang has been transported back in time.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max is shocked to learn her former college roommate is marrying a woman.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Kyle gets a promotion to middle management.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a single mom vanishes on Thanksgiving, authorities wonder if she has fallen prey to her battle with addiction; when they learn who she was last seen with, they discover they may not just be looking for their victim, but also for a killer.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a 911 call reports an apartment on fire, police arrive to find a young woman lying on her bedroom floor, unresponsive; as firefighters clear the apartment, they discover that it was no accident, rather an unfortunate tragedy or a cover up.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman is looking for a fresh start when she falls for a handsome stranger and when her new man asks for her help in a dangerous plot to make some quick cash, she decides to risk it all for love.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young mother becomes so hypnotized by love that she loses sight of reality and gets herself involved in murder.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A teenage girl with a bright future has to decide how far she is willing to go for a bad boy who tries to pull her into his life of crime.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Whitley is upset by the romantic dreams she has been having about Dwayne.

programme.desc: Jaleesa and Whitley are given the chance to become back-up singers for Gladys Knight.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's friend discusses problems he has encountered with his teenage daughter.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: The family sets out to give Theo a lesson on life's realities.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo's math test is postponed when his pregnant teacher goes into labor.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise's decision about what college she will attend becomes complicated when Cliff and his father give their advice.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When an apartment catches fire and a young woman is found dead inside, police assume it to be a tragic accident; a closer inspection of the scene unveils a more disturbing case, one the investigators could never have predicted.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a devoted nurse vanishes, her history with depression seems to be the only lead; but when friends insist, she'd never abandon her son, investigators dig deeper and soon discover how the young woman's wellness journey had turn into a secret life.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: Lifelong friends Whitney Caraway and Amanda Porter are closer than sisters; growing up in a dangerous area, the two relied on each other for stability, security and love; but when a man creates a rift between the friends, betrayal turns deadly.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A Baltimore mother reconnects with her childhood sweetheart, but she ends up in the middle of a criminal investigation; loyalty to her man may put the blame on her.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a devoted nurse vanishes, her history with depression seems to be the only lead; but when friends insist, she'd never abandon her son, investigators dig deeper and soon discover how the young woman's wellness journey had turn into a secret life.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: Lifelong friends Whitney Caraway and Amanda Porter are closer than sisters; growing up in a dangerous area, the two relied on each other for stability, security and love; but when a man creates a rift between the friends, betrayal turns deadly.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: Quinn and Vince get a lead on Nacole's case and learn about another cold case from 2005; solving these cases proves to be a test of patience, but as retirement draws near, the detectives begin to wonder if Nacole's case will ever be solved.

programme.title: Safe Room
programme.desc: After Ian accidentally witnesses a break-in in the house across the street and records the horrific murder of the homeowner, Lila becomes embroiled in a deadly struggle to protect her son.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Imunique gets fired; Jasmine becomes overwhelmed.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Delroy and Bridget make friends with an over-friendly couple, Ron and Tina; Jalen sues Latrell for joke jacking.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Imunique fights off a burglar but isn't sure she wants to rat when the police investigate.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Thelma locates her grandfather and invites him home for her dad's birthday.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Michael's elderly friend asks to move in with the Evanses for a most unusual reason.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff asks his stuffy former English professor to be his partner in a pinochle game.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff is determined to settle a score with a former track rival.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Clair puts Cliff on a diet after a friend suffers a mild heart attack.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff and the gang comb the house in search of an elusive snake.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: What Ever Happened to Baby Sister
programme.desc: Khadijah's younger sister gets drunk the night before a college track meet.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Trouble strikes when Max falls for a client charged with murder.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: A mugger foils Overton's proposal to Synclaire; a women's group persuades Max to run for office.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Overton identifies the mugger who stole the ring he bought for Synclaire and finally proposes.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a knock at the door lures a veteran to his death, police rely on his wife who overheard the crime; shocking workplace secrets generate a long list of suspects as police race to uncover who took revenge in the form of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Milan Boudreaux was a talented stylist living with her boyfriend in New Orleans; when her friends discover a grisly murder scene, detectives must ask if her risky lifestyle was to blame.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A woman, consumed by love, must decide how far she will go for a man who promised her the world.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A savvy salon owner falls hard for a suave bad boy and agrees to help him run an escort service; things turn violent and she has to make a choice; let him keep his grip around her heart or take back her power and end it all.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: An ambitious college student's man falls into the street life after losing his job, and he pulls her down with him; desperate to prove her devotion to him, she sacrifices not only her education but her freedom in the name of love.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Dwayne falls for his calculus teacher's (Glynn Turman) daughter.
